description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a smooth, natural wood grain finish. The front features two doors, one of which has a large, dark panel that may be a tinted glass or opaque insert, while the other is plain wood with a vertical handle. The wardrobe stands on a flat base and has clean, straight edges, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The handle is metallic and vertically oriented, positioned on the right door. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for storing clothing or other items. The wardrobe's design is practical for urban environments, such as apartments, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, modern wooden wardrobe with a dark panel on one door and a vertical metallic handle, featuring a smooth wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wood grain surface with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two doors, one with a dark panel and the other with a vertical metallic handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the plain wood grain surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a continuous wood grain panel with no visible features or hardware.
